summary:
SPIRITUAL FOUNDATIONS AND INTIMATE VISITATIONS: Brandon details a recent forty-five-minute visitation from the Lord, during which they discussed the future, President Trump, and the urgent need to focus on foundational faith. He highlights the profound impact of John Bevere's book on his life and ministry, emphasizing that true reverence and holy awe manifest God's presence. During this encounter, God revealed that He is not delaying His return but is patiently waiting for the church to bring in a massive global harvest of souls. God showed Brandon the massive wounds in His hands, pleading for laborers to gather the wheat as the sun sets on the current dispensation of grace.

MINISTRY ACCOUNTABILITY AND DEMONIC WATCHERS: Brandon relays a stern warning from God regarding financial mismanagement within Christian ministries. God expressed that He cannot trust many leaders with finances because they divert funds intended for the harvest, land, and buildings. Furthermore, Brandon describes a vision of demonic entities he calls watchers, who resembled feline creatures with glowing slit eyes. These demons take meticulous notes on the declarations of true prophets because Satan and his forces do not know God's plans until they are spoken on earth. This underscores the believer's authority and the vital importance of only speaking what God instructs, explaining why God sometimes remains intentionally silent.

GEOPOLITICAL PRAYER TARGETS AND NATIONAL SHAKING: Brandon issues an urgent call to intercede for President Trump's protection and for critical Supreme Court decisions regarding tariffs. He also encourages believers to pray for a historic harvest within the Muslim community during the upcoming Ramadan season. Highlighting spiritual shifts, Brandon expresses concern over Muslim calls to prayer echoing through New York and the construction of mosques in Bible Belt states like Oklahoma and Texas. He warns that a major shaking is coming to awaken the nation ahead of the crucial November elections, urging pulpits to return to preaching with Holy Ghost fire.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS OF PANDEMICS AND FALSE FLAGS: Brandon shares prophetic visions of impending crises, including a grotesque, sexually transmitted virus originating in the Northeast and spreading through Minnesota, Toronto, and New York. This severe infection causes welts and pus, eventually leading to victims becoming eunuchs. Additionally, Brandon predicts a massive global deception involving a staged alien invasion. He describes seeing a gigantic mothership hovering over the Vatican and Mayan temples, deploying smaller vessels across the United States. He warns that political figures and celebrities, including Barack Obama and Elon Musk, are already conditioning the public for this false flag event, which will even feature demonic entities disguised as extraterrestrials on television.

IMPENDING DISASTERS AND PROMINENT FIGURES: Brandon details a specific vision of a catastrophic explosion at a gas plant in Louisiana. He describes seeing large white containers and workers in white hard hats who will be vaporized in the blast, an event that will dominate national news networks. Additionally, Brandon shares that God instructed him to pray for various public figures, including Emmanuel Macron, Volodymyr Zelensky, Candace Owens, Glenn Beck, Tucker Carlson, and specifically Alex Jones. He prophesies that Alex Jones will undergo a deep spiritual transformation, gaining profound intimacy with God to become a bold, uncompromising voice in alternative media. Brandon concludes by warning that God is actively cleaning house within the church, executing judgments to purify ministries ahead of a final, unprecedented outpouring of glory.
rawData: [February 17, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/kcyoauFFjD0]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us tonight. We're excited you're here, and I'm excited to be here. We have work to do. I've been going over some things that I could share with you today and what the Lord has been talking to me about over the last several days. I've been taking my time and not doing as many live streams because of what the Holy Spirit has been instructing me on. So, let me start off with this: He said, I want you to go back to the basics. I want you to go back to the foundations of where you came from. Don't forget where you came from; the books you've read, the things that have ministered to you, read them again. Go over them again. Faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. And people that are more mature than you, you can learn from them. People that have been in ministry longer than you, you can learn from them. I don't know everything, of course, and being a newbie in this, I learn from people who have walked it longer than I have as far as ministry goes. It always goes back to this book. I know this isn't that old, but I don't even know this man, John Bevere, but The Awe of God has changed our life. I'm telling you, I look forward to my wife reading me this book. She reads it to me every day. We go over the chapters and she highlights and marks it all up. Then she found out that there are YouTube videos that talk about each chapter that John Bevere wrote. So we listen to it, and we go over it again, and we talk about it where we are in ministry. I've always said the first three chapters, you know, because I feel like if I can just get you to read part of it, if it ministers to Diana and me so much, I pray that it would minister to you. I don't recommend stuff very easily. I don't believe in selling books a lot unless the Holy Spirit has led you to, but this book right here, I'm going to tell you, it has changed my life. I cannot wait until he has a new book on March 3rd. It's about Jesus's return. Now, Diana said he made the comment that everything that he's preached up until now has changed or something like that. I hope, you know, I don't know what that means, so I'm not going to add to it or take away from it. But I want to say this: this book, sir, I don't know if you watch our broadcast, but I'm going to tell you, you got an A+ from me on this one. Not that that matters, but it does to me and my wife. Chapter 12, 13, 14 is probably some of the most important chapters. I told Diana, I said, I read over them and read over them. There are times whenever I do these live streams and the presence of the Lord is so thick in my house, and there's so much chatter on the live stream. He has a quote right here that I thought was really beautiful. Here is the bottom line, the truth: Where the Lord is reverenced, His presence manifests. I've thought about that a lot. If we reverence Him, He manifests. The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, but the awe of Him, the reverence—there's so much that I could pull out of this, and I could have Diana read these highlights of all these underlying things, we'd be here all night, but there's so much of this book that I don't know how else to describe it to you. Like I said, I don't sell or push books. I don't do that. I have everybody and their brother trying to give me their book to push on my channel, but I'm going to tell you, he's never talked to me and I've never talked to him, but this book has blessed me. So, she read it to me most of the day going over these chapters just because I don't want to get off track. There's so much that the Lord, as I was ministering, praying over our house and praying over things. Last night He visited me for 45 minutes. He spoke to me about the future. It was the most intimate conversation I've had with Him in a long time. This was when He visited here and talked about President Trump; it was spectacular, it was amazing. But last night was just a friend instructing me about the ministry and about what we're doing. I fear Him, not scared; I reverence Him with this holy awe, the awe of God. When I tell you what I'm about to talk about a little bit tonight, asking about why you haven't come yet—what are you waiting on? With all the things we see in the earth right now, what is it that you're waiting on? Why haven't things escalated like a lot of you have always done? Brandon, He should come back tomorrow, He should come back today. Oh, Jesus is coming. I believe that with all my heart. But what are we waiting on? He gave me scripture. He gave me James 5:7. Be patient, therefore, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth, and hath long patience for it, until he receives the early and the latter rain. That's in the New Testament. He said to me, I told you, you're—this is amazing. You're not waiting on me, I'm waiting on you. Bring in my harvest, for the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. I'm waiting on my treasure, my harvest. Brandon, I'm leaving the 99 to go after the one. How many times? Until He showed me that verse, the Lord of the harvest. He came to me and had holes in His hands. He said, I died for all of you. Help me bring them in. I've given you the farming equipment. The vast fields of harvest are plentiful, Brandon. Do you see the harvest? Help me bring in the harvest. I died for every one of them. He held out His hands. He had humongous holes. They went right here. It wasn't in the middle. It was right here. A massive hole. It went clear into His palm right here. It was a massive hole. It wasn't in the center of His hand. It was right in here. I want to tell you that hole is massive. It took up the whole bottom half of His hand. You can see right through it to see the wheat bowing down before Him as He walked by it. One last call. He said, The sun is setting on this dispensation of grace. If anybody remembers that visitation that I had and I saw the sun setting and it was lowered down, and He stood there with His priestly robe, and He kept His voice turned into a shofar and He started saying, One last call. He started screaming and it echoed through the valley, One last call. He was calling for the sheep, and there were all these sheep, all different kinds, and I told you all about it. Then I saw the Father standing, and I saw Jesus at the hoopa, and it was olive leaf, and it was cut out, and it was the most beautiful thing. He was waiting on the bride, and I asked the Lord then, again, He said, You're not waiting on me, I'm waiting on you. Bring in my harvest, and I'll come and get you. There's no urgency in the church for the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. There's not enough anticipation. A lot of people, we've become so dull and desensitized to the hearing of it that it's become just something we throw around. Jesus is coming. But the urgency of the hour and the expectation of it, we've become weary and wallowing, a lot of you. Oh, I have heard that. Brandon, you say that all the time, but I say it because it is real to me. And I yell it as loud as I can like John the Baptist, one crying in the wilderness, telling you, Jesus is coming. He is here, as the prophets of old cried out and warned that there was a king coming. Isaiah, all of them. How many times have we heard it? I want to be so sober to bring sobriety to you, to shake you, to waken you, to tell you again that our King is coming. It is not something that your grandma told you. I am being for real. Jesus is coming, but He is waiting for the fruit. James 5:7. If you need to hear it again, I will read it to you again. That is what He is waiting on. The fruit. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Bring in my harvest. This is where He was at as He talked to me last night. There are a lot of things He said I cannot talk about on your platform. It was just friend talk. He is my friend and I respect what He asked me to say. Therefore, do you have it? Be patient, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. See how the farmer waits for the precious fruit of the earth. It is the New King James Version. In the King James Version, be patient, therefore, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth and hath long patience. That means He is not in a hurry. He has long patience for it until He receives the early and the latter rain. He wants a major harvest. Can these bones live? That is what He was talking to me about, the harvest again. He said, There are so many that I cannot trust with the finances to get it done. He said, They will receive the money and do something else with it when I had an assignment for it. He said, Brandon, I will entrust you with much if you do not touch what is mine. Ministries, there are a lot of them that touch what is mine, and it is for the harvest. He said, I will give you yours and bless you, but keep the main thing the main thing. Do not touch what is mine. He said, There are a lot of ministers, Brandon, that do not do right with the money in the ministry, and I cannot trust them to get it done. I need buildings for my people for what is about to happen. I need land bought. But they will not do what I have asked them to do with it. They will be held accountable. As I was sitting there, I do not give any glory to the devil at all. I never talk about the devil or demons unless I feel instructed to, and tonight I do. I think a lot of things that Hollywood has, like Star Wars and other movies, they get the ideas from what they have seen in the demonic and they project it to you so you become desensitized. But as I was sitting there, the Lord said, I am going to allow you to see this again. I had forgotten about this, but He called them watchers. They looked like cats. They looked like the Black Panther movie. They had slight slit eyes, but they were glowing. They had a pad and they were writing down everything I was saying. I said, Lord, what are You allowing me to see that for? What is that? He said, They do not know what is coming. They do not know what I am about to do until I tell My prophetic voices in this earth. So they watch to see what is relayed, what you say. They do not know His next move because they are not intimate with Him. They are the ones that were cast out of heaven. Remember, they were watching and they were writing down everything they could to true prophetic voices that they knew were accurate. I am just telling you what I saw and what the Lord said. I do not look at Brandon Biggs as anything. I want everything to deflect to Him. They were taking note of things that I was saying privately. He said, There are certain things now that I will say to you that I do not want spoken out that you will hold. But because I said in My word that I do nothing in this earth unless I reveal it to My prophets first, I go by what I told and I stand by what I said I would do. Does that make sense, son? I do not want to add to or take away from anything my Son writes down. As I was in this moment, I realized the power and the authority of the believer and the words that He gives us, how important it is that we only say what He tells us to say. There have been times in this last couple of weeks that He has been silent and I have been like, What is wrong? What is going on? He said to me, The reason I am silent, there is a purpose for it. I only tell you what you need to hear when I need you to say it. If I am silent, it is not that I am angry. I go, Are we cool? Are we all right? What is going on? Because we have these conversations, but it is not instruction for the channel and for the people. He said, If I am quiet, I am quiet on purpose. I have nothing to say. Do you speak for Me? You do not speak for yourself, do you? I said, No. So, if I do not say nothing, that means I have nothing to say. It is not personal. Grow up. Go back to what I told you to do in the first place. Pray. You do not have to have a new vision. He said, Brandon, I can give you one thing, one vision to pray about on that channel, and you take that assignment and pray over it for months. I have given you a lot of stuff to bring to the people that they could intercede for, for the nations, for the harvest. If they will learn who they are in their authority and use their authority over their area, it would help. It is according to the word when it says that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. He has blinded their eyes. But we take authority as believing believers and use our authority over the devil. We have power and authority over him to break off those chains that bind all of our unsaved loved ones and the eyes that are fogged. According to Ephesians 1, let the eyes of their understanding be enlightened. How much Jesus loves them. Paraphrase. How much God loves them. Let the eyes of their understanding be enlightened. What are they being enlightened to? That Jesus has a plan for their life. Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health even as your soul prospers. Overflow. God is a God of overflow. Abundance to the full, to the extreme, to it overflows. He wants you to live a good life, healed and whole and delivered by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ, what He did for you. As He is, so are we in this world. Brandon, just go back to the fundamentals. Keep praying. If I do not give you a new word, go back to the things you consider old. They are not old. Nothing is old. It is still new. But go back to the things I have told you and pray over them, especially with what I have seen concerning Iran and the president and what we are going to do to pray over President Trump and his protection and pray over his family and pray over our nation for the decisions that will be made with the Supreme Court concerning the tariffs in the next couple of weeks. Whenever they come back, I believe it was February 20th. They come back from their winter recess, so we pray over that. Praying over this decision whenever they go into Ramadan. I believe Ramadan starts this Wednesday. I am praying for the greatest harvest of souls in the Muslim community we have ever seen. God does not want anyone to perish, but all to come to repentance. I want to show you what is happening right now in New York. Congress is on recess until February 23rd, 2026. I want to show you the urgency of the hour and the major shaking that is about to awaken this nation. The Lord said, I am going to bring a shaking to awaken. I have seen all these major events and buildings on the 41st floor in Chicago on the riverfront and the hotels. Look, this is New York. It does not matter to me. They are all the trash. That is a call to prayer. A Muslim call to prayer all throughout New York. They voted for it. Are they shocked they got what they voted for? That should make believers mad. What are we doing? You can stop it. I do not want to hear that anymore. I am trying to tell you that as it goes in the east and the major storm I saw brewing on the east coast, I am praying for President Trump to make the right choices for our nation. This is the kind of trash they want to put all throughout our nation. They just had a vote on it in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma. We just had a vote in Broken Arrow. Brother Hagin's Ministries is there. They just voted on putting a huge mosque or synagogue there in Tulsa. I do not know if it passed, but my point is that they are trying to do it in the Bible Belt and in Texas. If we do not wake up, church, and start preaching Holy Ghost and fire in our pulpits, telling people that Jesus Christ is coming, we need to get serious about our Creator's return. This is serious stuff. The election coming in November of this year, in the next nine months, is a great opportunity. I am telling you, all it takes is people going to sleep and not voting. I look at that in New York and I think, oh, dear God, that is not that far away from here. People were freaking out, sending us emails about the virus concerning this sexually transmitted disease. Now, this is foul. There is an infection all over their faces. Do you remember I told you I saw a new sexually transmitted virus coming that would be so grotesque that it would bring welts and pus all over your body? Now, is this what I was shown? I saw that eventually they would have to eunuch them because the infection would not stop. It would reoccur and they would have to do what they needed to do to fix it. Eventually, it would end up killing them. The Lord warned us it was coming. The Lord said this is a result of messing with the kids and it will start up northeast. I believe this is in Minnesota. It is happening up northeast. I saw it would go into Toronto and spread all throughout New York. Is this the virus? I do not know. It is very nasty. I am in Minnesota. The largest known outbreak of a sexually transmitted ringworm. That is disgusting. Health officials say it is transmitted. I mean, that is foul. But what I saw coming would make you a eunuch. I do not know if it goes on their private parts or not; it was on his face, but pretty foul. Then we have Obama. Former US President Barack Obama says aliens are real. I said they would start to really come out and say before the rapture of the church that aliens are real. I said there would be a false flag event that will shock all the world. I saw something over the Vatican, something over the Mayan temples, and it had lightning and light coming off of it, and it looked like a massive ship. These little space-looking things came out of the mothership and started shooting around the United States at the speed of light. It looked the size of a car and it freaked everybody out. I saw an interview of a demonic figure on TV that looked like a creature off of the movie Guardians of the Galaxy. He was talking to the interviewer. Great deceptions. Now, that sounds way out there, and it was way out there for me to see it in great detail because I thought surely this is not real. Lord, I test the spirits. I am human. I can miss it. I am not here to say I get everything right. I do the best I can. But what I saw in 2014 is manifesting on the screen. Even Elon Musk is saying jokingly, I am part alien. I think it is kind of interesting where we are. Diana was reading to me some of these things. He was basically saying some things about the chat and about reverence. As we seek Him with holy fear, He will manifest. People are really going to start to persecute you on a greater level, warning me about things He had for me and my family. He said true persecution, you haven't seen it until you start getting it from the secular media. He said, 'The comment section and the emails are nothing until CNN, ABC, and MSNBC start persecuting you on that vast world's attention. You got a bunch of people that are just like whatever.' But when the world starts to hate you, it's a whole different story. He's warning me about things. I think it's interesting. I just push. But I go, 'Okay, God, whatever you have for me, I just want to finish strong, y'all.' And whenever I get on the other side of this, he said, 'Well done, Brandon. You gave it all you got. You did the best you could.' I don't want to get up there and say, 'Well, I'm semi-disappointed.' My biggest concern is that he said, 'I want you to teach my people to pray. I want you to bring them, teach them how to come into the throne.' I had an email from a school teacher and he was telling me how this channel has changed his life and that he teaches what we teach on the channel. A student walked up to him and said, 'Thank you for teaching me how to get close to God.' He has 141 students, he said. And he teaches how to get close to God through the things he's learned on this channel on the way to school. He listens to us talk. And that blessed me. So I thought, what if just one of those kids are the next Billy Graham? You never know who you're imparting into and who you're talking to. You could be talking to your neighbor and they'd be the next Smith Wigglesworth, the next Peter, the next John the Baptist; who knows? I don't know. Somebody that's touching the nations for Jesus. However, the person who fears God has nothing to hide. He or she is terrified of being away from God. This is illustrated by the fact that while the people drew back, Moses simultaneously drew near to God. The person who fears God doesn't say within themselves, 'How close can I get to the line of sin and not fall in?' No, he or she says, 'I want to be so close to God and so far away from the line that I cannot even see it.' He's talking about being in the world. Be ye imitators of God, dear children, as children imitate their father. Be an imitator of God. I love that. There's a level of holiness that he is requiring us to come up higher in our relationship with him to walk in the greater glory. I don't want to be where I am in my relationship with the Lord this time next year. I don't want to be where I'm at right now. If I'm at where I'm at right now and I'm not going from glory to glory, that's why I sing that song. From glory to glory, he's changing me, changing me, changing me. His likeness and image to perfect in me. The love of God shown to the world. For he's changing, he's changing me from earthly things to the heavenly. His likeness and image to perfecting me. The love of God shown to the world from glory to glory. He's changing me, changing me, changing me. His likeness in image to perfect in me, the love of God shown to the world. I love some of these little quotes he has in there. I wish I read better. Diana reads to me, and I try to find the things that I have to read over and over before I can give it to you so you'll understand what I'm saying. Some of the things that I told her, I said, 'Baby, it's so easy to get off track.' The bigger the things happen in ministry... I used to criticize people all the time, big ministers, you watch them and you go, 'Boy, look at them where they are with God.' And they lose that fear. The pressure of people and the pressure of performance will suck you dry. And then I realize how I got here in the first place and I go back to the first fruit and I repent. Oh God, help me to always stay on track. Help me to be close to you. All these people and all these different ministries and all their opinions, they could take it to hell where they came from. That's what I tell Diana. I don't care. I want so much just to please him. And I sit at his feet and I go, 'Oh, when you get back in that vein, it only takes a couple weeks.' Pressure and you'll get off on the wrong road. And he's quiet even in the intimacy where you go, 'What's going on?' But the moment you start to check that inside of yourself, you start going, 'What's happening? I don't want to be what I see so much of, what I have been allowed to see so much of because of the platform.' I'm not judging these men and women. It may come across that way, but I see that they've lost their intimacy. A lot of them have lost their way and they still feel like they're close and they're on the vine, but they lost their way a long time ago and the platform sustains them for right now. And it's like the Lord showed me. He said, 'You can cut yourself off of there, Brandon, but a branch does not die instantaneously. It takes a little bit. It dries up a little bit at a time. There's life in it for a little bit.' And that's where a lot of believers are. They've been pruned back and they don't even realize it. They lost the fear of God. They lost the awe of God. And that's why he always takes me back to books like this, The Ultimate Voice by Oral Roberts. We read it over and over and over. And I said, 'Well, I know, D. We heard it.' But she goes, 'I love it. There's something about it. It's just precious to us.' So, I just bring these little things to you if I could help anybody with their walk with the Lord to get closer to him. Even if you feel like you've gotten off track, he's an ever-present help in a time of need. He's not left you. You've left him. He's always there to help you. But we've got to get back to the intimacy with the Father. And it's so easy. It's like Diana said, 'Don't you see? The very people,' and I don't say this for you to say, 'Bren, don't focus on the people who criticize.' I'm trying to give an example to you. You want to know my life? The very people that criticize try to get you to be like them, but they're watching and they don't realize that when they criticize how you sing the songs wrong, you see, it's intimacy like a child. And they want you to be like them, but they're dead. They haven't heard him in years. You hear him every day, hun. But how is it that they try to come and correct you in the emails when they have no intimacy with the Father at all? I have been so open, so transparent as much as I can be with the public to teach you the basics of how to get there. Maybe I'm a good teacher about it, maybe I'm not. But I've tried to teach you how to get there with songs and finding the word to stand on, to teach you how to just say these scriptures, to pray in the spirit, that it's just being so... When you get real with God, God will get real with you. He'll become real with you. Does that make sense? So, I said enough, but I've just been quiet because he's been quiet and I've been listening to him, but it wasn't anything that he said he wanted shared on this platform. The things that he's had me say, he said, 'I want you to be very slow concerning these things. I don't want it out there yet. There's things that I don't know if he'll ever allow me to say concerning where we're going and what's about to take place.' So, I don't know. I just wait. That's what he said. Are you in charge or am I? I said, Well, you definitely are. You know, and so that is why I think a lot of people go, Where did he go? I do not use him, he uses me. I understand it more now than ever. It sounds like something really good sometimes when Kathryn Kuhlman would say it and Diana goes, You know, it sounds so, it is so appeasing to the Christian area. Oh, yeah. I do not use him, he uses me. No, no, no, no, no. I get it more and more every single day. When it is not there, it is not there. That cloak is what I am talking about. He uses me. I cannot turn this on without him. I feel it so strong tonight. It is weighing a fire on my ears. It is like he holds a matchstick on my ears. I can feel my right ear burn to the point where it feels like somebody is taking a lighter sometimes and it is burning it. But it is when the glory comes on me, it does not hurt. I just know when it is there, it comes on me. And I have told even my mom and dad, I told everybody I said, My ears are hot like fire. They will burn and he will talk. It just fills my whole head and I see and over. And there are levels of it. There are levels of the glory. There are levels of hearing. When he comes on me like that, I start to cry a lot when I am just in the house. You say, Are you a basket case? No. His presence is so purified. It makes me weep. But there is an inner court, there is an outer court, and there is a Holy of Holies. And I can assure you there is a difference. Christ in me, the hope of glory. Father, what is communion? Father, we just thank you, Father, for this time. Lord, I thank you for every single person who is represented here tonight. We bless them, Father. Christ in me, the hope of glory, going from glory to glory. Father, I thank you, Lord, for your body that was broken for us. Now, when you take this tonight, picture yourself inside healed. Be a believing believer that believes they are healed by the stripes of Jesus. Do not just take this and be like, Oh, it is just a wafer. He became sickness for us. By his stripes, we are healed. And this is what it represents. His body took it all on the cross for us. Everything. Galatians, Christ has redeemed me from the curse of the law. And I believe it. And I thank you, Father, that from the top of my head to the soles of my feet, the glory renews me, healed and whole and well in Jesus name. I thank you, Father, that just like you did Moses, you do me, Father, that the glory of the Lord kept him. 120 years, his eyes did not grow dim. I thank you, Father, that our bodies are healed and whole and well. Our metabolisms are good. Our minds are renewed by the word. And we are so grateful for all that you have done and all that you are going to do in these last days. And we wake up, Lord, because we know and we are looking up, for our redemption draws nigh.
